symptoms.symptom_name: Acute onset of panic and autonomic arousal time-locked to bereavement news

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sudden autonomic symptoms directly triggered by catastrophic news are characteristic of acute panic.
A clear acute psychological trigger explains the autonomic surge without ischaemia.
Palpitations are a core somatic feature of panic.
Palpitations alone are non-specific and do not by themselves indicate ischaemia.

symptoms.symptom_name: Hyperventilation and chest tightness without ischaemic-quality pain or hypoxia

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Hyperventilation with a subjective tight chest but no crushing/radiating pain is typical of panic.
Absence of ischaemic-quality pain with normal oxygen saturation reduces the probability of ACS.

symptoms.symptom_name: No self-noticed breast lump, skin/nipple change or discharge (patient-reported negative)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of self-noticed findings lowers concern but patient self-examination is unreliable — it does not exclude malignancy, which is why an in-person exam and mammogram are still needed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Clinician-measured vitals — BP 150/92, HR 112, RR 20, SpO2 100%, afebrile

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Tachycardia and transient hypertension with normal oxygen saturation and no fever fit a sympathetic panic surge; sealed clinician measurement, not obtainable over chat.
Normal SpO2 and the absence of any objective ischaemic marker argue against an acute cardiac event.

symptoms.symptom_name: Clinical breast examination — no palpable mass, no skin/nipple change, no discharge, no lymphadenopathy

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A normal in-person breast exam substantially lowers concern but is not definitive without imaging; cannot be performed via telehealth — sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Screening mammography (bilateral CC and MLO views)

investigation_details.expected_result: Anticipated no suspicious microcalcifications or spiculated masses (expected, not yet performed) — the definitive screening test, deferred to the in-person pathway.
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Without the screening referral the patient's legitimate screening need and reassurance are not met.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Screening mammography is the population test that provides real reassurance in an asymptomatic woman; never available in real time over telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: First-degree family history of breast cancer

snomed_ref.display: Family history of malignant neoplasm of breast

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A first-degree relative raises lifetime risk and pre-test probability, reinforcing the value of screening — but does not itself indicate current disease.
The relative's death is the precipitant of the acute panic and the health anxiety.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Acute autonomic panic triggered by bereavement
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: The autonomic surge is fully explained by acute stress; taken together these distinguish benign panic from an acute cardiac event.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Age-eligible asymptomatic woman — the correct pathway is routine 2-yearly screening, not urgent diagnostic imaging.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person clinical breast examination by a GP
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Cannot be performed via telehealth; provides the physical reassurance the encounter needs and screens for any palpable red flag.
Tachycardia and hypertension are clearly distress-linked with no ischaemic features and normal oxygen saturation; an emergency cardiac work-up would be over-investigation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent diagnostic breast imaging / suspected-cancer breast clinic referral
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Reserved for symptomatic women (palpable lump, skin/nipple change); this asymptomatic patient follows routine screening — an urgent referral would amplify anxiety without clinical basis.
